arts.ttl: DFL launches investigation against Bayern player who insulted Leverkusen boss
arts.sum: After Sven Ulreich was caught on camera insulting Bayer Leverkusen boss Simon Rolfes during Saturday's game at the Allianz Arena, the German Football League (DFL) has launched an investigation against the Bayern Munich goalkeeper.
Joshua Kimmich believes Bayern Munich made Bayer Leverkusen look "harmless" in Saturday's 1-1 draw.

arts.ttl: Champions League | Bayer Leverkusen v AC Milan: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Milan prepare to face Bayer Leverkusen in their second Champions League match, the German champions are ready to present a formidable challenge at the BayArena. Coming off a 1-1 draw against Bayern Munich in the Bundesliga, Xabi Alonso’s side is looking to maintain their strong form in European competition. Alonso is expected to stick with his preferred 3-4-2-1 formation, likely fielding the same starting eleven that faced Bayern Munich. Here’s how Bayer Leverkusen is expected to line up: In goal, Hradecky will continue as the last line of defense. arts.ttl: Milan captain Calabria mentioned in Ultra arrests Investigation
arts.sum: In a recent development related to the arrests of 19 members of Inter and Milan’s organized fan groups, Milan captain Davide Calabria has been mentioned in the investigation documents. While not accused of any wrongdoing, Calabria’s name appears in connection with a meeting that allegedly took place with a prominent ultra leader. According to the investigation report, Calabria met with Luca Lucci, the head of Milan’s Curva Sud, at a bar in Cologno Monzese on February 8, 2023. arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs Milan: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen and Milan meet on Matchday 2 of the Champions League league phase after the two sides picked up contrasting results in their respective openers. This is the first competitive fixture between Bayer Leverkusen and Milan.
